message:
test(replay): golden test suite for decision-diff pipeline (ft-og6q6.5.6)

26 golden tests covering the full pipeline: graph → diff → risk → report → gate.
Tests verify: identical/modified/added/removed/shifted divergences, severity ordering,
JSON schema completeness, CSV column consistency, report idempotency, gate evaluation,
annotation exclusion, and full roundtrip serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
